mapper.insert: INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, black_user_id, black_token, random_match) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{blackUserId}, #{blackToken}, #{randomMatch})

INSERT INTO room_participants (room_id, black_user_id, black_token, observer_user_id, observer_token, puzzle_room, puzzle_init_board_json, puzzle_side_to_move, random_match) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{blackUserId}, #{blackToken}, #{observerUserId}, #{observerToken}, 1, #{puzzleInitBoardJson}, #{puzzleSideToMove}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE room_participants SET white_user_id = #{whiteUserId}, white_token = #{whiteToken}, white_is_bot = 0, bot_search_depth_min = NULL, bot_search_depth_max = NULL, bot_ai_style = NULL WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND white_user_id IS NULL

UPDATE room_participants SET white_is_bot = #{whiteIsBot}, black_is_bot = #{blackIsBot}, bot_search_depth_min = #{dmin}, bot_search_depth_max = #{dmax}, bot_ai_style = #{botAiStyle} WHERE room_id = #{roomId}
mapper.select: SELECT room_id, black_user_id, black_token, white_user_id, white_token, friend_watch_token, white_is_bot, black_is_bot, bot_search_depth_min, bot_search_depth_max, bot_ai_style, observer_user_id, observer_token, puzzle_room, random_match, puzzle_init_board_json, puzzle_side_to_move FROM room_participants WHERE room_id = #{roomId} LIMIT 1
